variant.description: Visual style — default, solid, border, shadow, gradient, flat, or relief.

color.description: Accent color — a theme name (primary, success…) or any CSS color.

type.description: Semantic shortcut (success, info, warning, error) that sets a color and a leading icon.

text.description: Body text (shorthand for the default slot).

icon.description: Leading icon name, or false to hide the type icon.

closable.description: Shows a dismiss button that hides the alert.

progress.description: 0–100 value for the bottom progress bar.

hiddenContent.description: Boolean (use `v-model:hidden-content`) — makes the title collapse/expand the content.

update:modelValue.description: Emitted when the alert is dismissed.

update:hiddenContent.description: Emitted when the content is collapsed or expanded.

footer.description: A footer row, typically for actions.

page-1.description: Content for page 1 (add page-2, page-3, … for more).
